spec_match.rationale: Demonstrates compat checking and progressive enhancement zoom override setups.

interactive.rationale: Features six distinct browser support probes and comparison state toggles.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligned with compatibility verification and @supports queries.

edge_cases.rationale: Specifically tackles progressive enhancement and fallback transform setups.

references.rationale: Correctly links to MDN zoom and ChromeStatus entry.

design_system.rationale: Adheres to global spacing, border, and button coloring rules.

summary: A very high-quality progressive enhancement sandbox containing six capability probes, visual fallback comparisons, and copyable CSS support query templates.
